Virgil van Dijk hoping to bring calm for Liverpool amidst the gathering Manchester storm, writes @_ChrisBascombe

Van Dijk: “I’m never nervous. I am just excited. I think, ‘look where I am, playing for the semi-finals of the Champions League with my team. Just enjoy it and love it’.”

Van Dijk: “Everyone around us is fantastic and should be proud of how we defend and how many goals we have scored. Without the help of everyone else Mo (Salah) would not have so many goals. Everyone is doing their bit.”

Van Dijk: "I am enjoying every bit of it. I love the club already. I knew from day one we made the (right) decision.”

Jurgen Klopp will wait until matchday before deciding whether to unleash Mo Salah on Manchester City. (@MirrorFootball)

Klopp: “Mo trained with Alberto Moreno [who also missed the weekend's Mersey derby] with the athletic coach yesterday. Afterwards, both said, 'We will be fine.'”

Klopp: “We have training, then we have to wait for the reaction tomorrow and we will make a decision. Everyone will have to see after the session.”

Even if Salah and Moreno both make it, Klopp doesn’t have enough fit, senior professionals to fill out his starting XI and seven-man bench. That means 17-year-old midfielder Curtis Jones is likely to be among the visitors' subs. (Mirror)

replies.msg:
今晚稍後的利曼決戰，在數據上當然是利物浦佔優，歷來歐聯有126次有球隊在首回合主場領先三比零，最終亦成功進級的有119次，換句話說，在這情況下只有七次反底的出現。其餘經典的反底像近年的巴塞反勝巴黎聖日耳門及十三年前利物浦上半場落後三比零但最終迫和AC兼射贏十二碼捧埋盃，皆説明大比數落後並不一定玩完，只不過成功機會較低而已！數據通常都是我們講波佬用來吹吹水的，對比賽的實際發展絶無影響！

這一戰的關鍵在於雙方領隊，在上週賽後，哥帥壓力較大，這一個星期他如何替球隊及自己減壓至為重要；高帥在這星期最重要是防止球員有想贏怕輸的心態，否則第二回合會進退失據。講到尾都是心理輔導大於技術指導！

戰術方面，咁聰明嘅你都會知道久守必失，所以利物浦一定冇得縮，而且仲要搶中場，打番上次的套路。曼城則冇得諗，一定要儘早取得入球穏定軍心，所以上半場好關鍵，利物浦只要上半場零失球就成功了一半，曼城的爭勝壓力也越來越大，相反，曼城有了早來的入球，則信心必定大增，如能令對手進退失據便成功在望！

結語：利曼一戰定生死，哥帥看似進級微，若然利記失攻守，到時曼城就有機！
